## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] README.md included / updated
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials (env vars only)
- [ ] Required OAuth / platform token scopes documented
- [ ] `.env.example` provided (if new sample)
- [ ] `.gitignore` present in sample directory
- [ ] Cleanup / destroy instructions included
- [ ] Tested locally (`terraform plan` / `monaco deploy --dry-run`)
